calendar.matters:
DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar per dismissal of entire action, filed April 15, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Preemptory Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER WILLIAM MAROTZ' Motion For Preemptory Writ Of Mandamus.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Case dismissed on April 15, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
